summary: Comprehensive testing of Lefteria FC football club website completed. Backend API testing achieved 96.4% success rate (27/28 tests passed). Frontend testing was highly successful with all major functionality working correctly including navigation, forms, admin panel, and mobile responsiveness.

minor_bugs.issue: Returns 422 validation error instead of 404 for invalid age group (U99)
minor_bugs.impact: Minor - API correctly validates input but returns different status code than expected

minor_issues.issue: Admin players table selector not found during automated testing
minor_issues.impact: Minor - Admin panel loads and functions correctly, may be timing issue with table rendering

passed_tests: Homepage loads with hero section, stats bar, fixtures widget, standings table, and news
Navigation works across all pages (Home, About, First Team, Academy, Fixtures, News, Contact, Admin)
First Team page displays players with position filtering working correctly
Academy page shows age groups with coach info and training schedules
Fixtures page displays matches with status filtering (All, Scheduled, Completed)
News page shows featured and regular news articles
Contact form submission works and shows success message
Admin panel loads and shows data for all sections (Players, Fixtures, News, Standings, Academy, Messages)
League standings table displays correctly with Lefteria FC highlighted
Mobile responsiveness works with hamburger menu
Dark theme with orange/gold (#F5A623) accents implemented correctly
Data seeding via POST /api/seed endpoint works correctly
